analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces an International Advisory Group statement on reforming Ukraine's Security Service and tags EU, NATO, US Embassy, Ukraine’s parliament, and the Security Service. It provides no content of the statement or value judgments. Evaluation: EU1 (EU success story) – not promoted; no mention of EU history, achievements, or learning from past. EU2 (EU united) – not promoted; while multiple Western institutions are tagged, there is no explicit claim of EU unity or joint EU member-state solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – not applicable; not about EU internal benefits to citizens. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – not indicated; no leadership/pioneering framing. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – not stated; no human rights/democracy advocacy claims in the text. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – potentially relevant if the statement showed EU support to improve security/governance in a neighbor, but the tweet itself does not articulate such contribution—only an announcement with tags. Conclusion: The tweet is informational and does not clearly promote any listed narratives.
